title: Respect CONTAINERS_REGISTRIES_CONF
body:
Currently it looks as if buildah disregards the podman registry path environment variable `CONTAINERS_REGISTRIES_CONF` and instead containues to load the registry file from the default path irregardless of whether `CONTAINERS_REGISTRIES_CONF` is set.

Could the behavior between buildah and podman be synchronized in this regard?

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

This may be solved as part of the config file changes, see
https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/27657
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
work is going on in containers-libs for the new config changes and planned to come with podman 6 which will include the buildah update with this as well.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
